name: recent-funding-rounds
description: Find recent funding rounds via Brave Search news-search (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router). Searches recent news articles announcing startup funding rounds in a sector — returns news coverage of raises, not a structured funding database — all through the SELAT routed payment rail.

sector.description: Sector or industry to search funding-round news for, in plain words, e.g. 'artificial intelligence', 'fintech', 'climate tech'. Interpolated into the news query '${sector} startup funding round announced'.

steps.label: recent funding-round news — Brave Search (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
